response: {"name":"Blocking RBP binding by antisense oligonucleotide","description":"Antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) transfection into 293T cells to block RBP (RBFOX2) binding sites on target pre-mRNAs, followed by RT-PCR-based splicing assay to measure exon inclusion (PSI) changes.","data_type":"other","raw_data_source":null,"steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"293T cells in 24-well format are transfected with antisense oligonucleotides (ASOs) using RNAiMax lipofection reagent; complexes are pre-incubated in OptiMEM before addition to cells.","input_data":"293T cells; antisense oligonucleotides targeting RBFOX2 binding sites (Isis Pharmaceuticals)","output_data":"ASO-transfected 293T cells","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"transfection_reagent":"RNAiMax (Thermo Fisher)","RNAiMax_volume":"1.5 uL","ASO_concentration":"100 uM","complex_incubation_volume":"50 uL OptiMEM","complex_incubation_time":"30 minutes","cell_incubation_time":"36 hours","well_format":"24-well"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":2,"description":"Total RNA is isolated from ASO-treated cells using standard TRIzol extraction.","input_data":"ASO-transfected 293T cells","output_data":"Total RNA","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"extraction_reagent":"TRIzol (Thermo Fisher)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":3,"description":"Reverse transcription is performed using SuperScript III to generate cDNA from total RNA.","input_data":"Total RNA","output_data":"cDNA","software":"SuperScript III","software_version":null,"parameters":{"manufacturer":"Thermo Fisher"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":4,"description":"PCR amplification of splicing products is performed using Phusion DNA polymerase with primers located in flanking constitutive exons to detect exon inclusion and exclusion isoforms.","input_data":"cDNA","output_data":"PCR amplicons corresponding to exon inclusion and exclusion isoforms","software":"Phusion DNA polymerase","software_version":null,"parameters":{"manufacturer":"Thermo Fisher","primer_location":"flanking constitutive exons"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":5,"description":"PCR products are resolved by agarose gel electrophoresis and imaged;
